title: Timothee Chalamet Wins Critics Choice Award, Thanks Kylie Jenner
text: Timothée Chalamet's Critics Choice Awards Speech. At the 2026 Critics Choice Awards, Chalamet won Best Actor for Marty Supreme. During his acceptance speech, he expressed nervousness about the moment, stating: Damn, I'm more nervous than I thought I'd be. He emphasized the significance of the win, saying: I don't know if I'll be up here again, so give me a second, before thanking various people. Chalamet specifically praised fellow nominee Michael B. Jordan and director Josh Safdie for crafting a role and a story for him. He also publicly thanked his longtime partner Kylie Jenner, declaring: I love you. I couldn't do this without you, while the camera captured her reaction in the audience. This win came just one week before his Golden Globes victory, demonstrating strong momentum heading into the major awards ceremony.
